rationale: Gov't Code §2256.009 governs authorized investments for governmental entities. It is wholly unrelated to the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 2256.009. AUTHORIZED INVESTMENTS: OBLIGATIONS OF, OR GUARANTEED BY GOVERNMENTAL ENTITIES.
_note: Rule text concerns public investment authority; proposed change concerns property tax exemptions. No overlap.
